elements.content:
Social App Blueprint

- Client app sends requests
- API gateway owns ingress
- Microservices own business logic
- Data stores power posts, feeds, and interactions

flowchart LR subgraph ClientLayer[Client Layer] C["Mobile / Web Client"] end subgraph EdgeLayer[Edge Layer] G["API Gateway"] CDN["CDN
media delivery"] end subgraph ServiceLayer[Microservices] Auth["Auth Service"] UserSvc["User Service"] PostSvc["Post Service"] FeedSvc["Feed Service"] NotifSvc["Notification Service"] SearchSvc["Search Service"] AnalyticsSvc["Analytics Service"] Mesh["Service Mesh"] end subgraph DataLayer[Data Stores] UserDB[("User DB")] PostDB[("Post DB")] FeedCache[("Feed Cache")] MediaStore[("Object Storage")] EventBus[("Event Bus")] SearchIndex[("Search Index")] end C --> G C --> CDN G --> Auth G --> UserSvc G --> PostSvc G --> FeedSvc G --> NotifSvc G --> SearchSvc Auth --> UserDB UserSvc --> UserDB PostSvc --> PostDB PostSvc --> MediaStore FeedSvc --> FeedCache FeedSvc --> PostDB FeedSvc --> UserDB NotifSvc --> EventBus SearchSvc --> SearchIndex AnalyticsSvc --> EventBus Mesh --- Auth Mesh --- UserSvc Mesh --- PostSvc Mesh --- FeedSvc Mesh --- NotifSvc classDef active fill:#0f172a,stroke:#38bdf8,color:#ffffff,stroke-width:3px; classDef inactive fill:#111827,stroke:#334155,color:#94a3b8,stroke-width:1px; class C,G,CDN,Auth,UserSvc,PostSvc,FeedSvc,NotifSvc,SearchSvc,AnalyticsSvc,Mesh,UserDB,PostDB,FeedCache,MediaStore,EventBus,SearchIndex active;

Authentication Path

- Client calls the API gateway
- Auth service validates credentials
- Token comes back to the client
- Every later request carries that token

flowchart LR subgraph ClientLayer[Client Layer] C["Mobile / Web Client"] Token["Access Token"] end subgraph EdgeLayer[Edge Layer] G["API Gateway"] CDN["CDN
media delivery"] end subgraph ServiceLayer[Microservices] Auth["Auth Service"] UserSvc["User Service"] PostSvc["Post Service"] FeedSvc["Feed Service"] NotifSvc["Notification Service"] SearchSvc["Search Service"] AnalyticsSvc["Analytics Service"] Mesh["Service Mesh"] end subgraph DataLayer[Data Stores] UserDB[("User DB")] PostDB[("Post DB")] FeedCache[("Feed Cache")] MediaStore[("Object Storage")] EventBus[("Event Bus")] SearchIndex[("Search Index")] end C --> G G --> Auth Auth --> UserDB Auth --> Token Token -. sent with calls .-> G C --> CDN G --> UserSvc G --> PostSvc G --> FeedSvc G --> NotifSvc G --> SearchSvc UserSvc --> UserDB PostSvc --> PostDB PostSvc --> MediaStore FeedSvc --> FeedCache FeedSvc --> PostDB FeedSvc --> UserDB NotifSvc --> EventBus SearchSvc --> SearchIndex AnalyticsSvc --> EventBus Mesh --- Auth Mesh --- UserSvc Mesh --- PostSvc Mesh --- FeedSvc Mesh --- NotifSvc classDef active fill:#1e1b4b,stroke:#a78bfa,color:#ffffff,stroke-width:3px; classDef inactive fill:#111827,stroke:#334155,color:#64748b,stroke-width:1px; class C,G,Auth,UserDB,Token active; class CDN,UserSvc,PostSvc,FeedSvc,NotifSvc,SearchSvc,AnalyticsSvc,Mesh,PostDB,FeedCache,MediaStore,EventBus,SearchIndex inactive;

Routing Layer

- Gateway checks the token
- Requests fan out to focused services
- Service mesh handles internal traffic
- Policies stay close to the calls

flowchart LR subgraph ClientLayer[Client Layer] C["Mobile / Web Client"] Token["Access Token"] end subgraph EdgeLayer[Edge Layer] G["API Gateway"] CDN["CDN
media delivery"] end subgraph ServiceLayer[Microservices] Auth["Auth Service"] UserSvc["User Service"] PostSvc["Post Service"] FeedSvc["Feed Service"] NotifSvc["Notification Service"] SearchSvc["Search Service"] AnalyticsSvc["Analytics Service"] Mesh["Service Mesh
mTLS + retries"] end subgraph DataLayer[Data Stores] UserDB[("User DB")] PostDB[("Post DB")] FeedCache[("Feed Cache")] MediaStore[("Object Storage")] EventBus[("Event Bus")] SearchIndex[("Search Index")] end C --> G Token -. auth header .-> G C --> CDN G --> Auth G --> UserSvc G --> PostSvc G --> FeedSvc G --> NotifSvc G --> SearchSvc Auth --> UserDB UserSvc --> UserDB PostSvc --> PostDB PostSvc --> MediaStore FeedSvc --> FeedCache FeedSvc --> PostDB FeedSvc --> UserDB NotifSvc --> EventBus SearchSvc --> SearchIndex AnalyticsSvc --> EventBus Mesh --- Auth Mesh --- UserSvc Mesh --- PostSvc Mesh --- FeedSvc Mesh --- NotifSvc Mesh --- SearchSvc classDef active fill:#064e3b,stroke:#34d399,color:#ffffff,stroke-width:3px; classDef inactive fill:#111827,stroke:#334155,color:#64748b,stroke-width:1px; class G,Token,Auth,UserSvc,PostSvc,FeedSvc,NotifSvc,SearchSvc,Mesh active; class C,CDN,AnalyticsSvc,UserDB,PostDB,FeedCache,MediaStore,EventBus,SearchIndex inactive;

Data Model

- Post stores author, content, media, time
- User stores profile data
- Media sits in object storage
- Feed projection is optimized for reads

flowchart LR User["User
• id
• handle
• profile
• followers"] Post["Post
• id
• authorId
• content
• mediaUrls
• createdAt"] Media["Media Object
• url
• type
• size
• storage key"] FeedItem["Feed Projection
• userId
• postId
• rank score
• cached payload"] Cache[("Feed Cache")] UserDB[("User DB")] PostDB[("Post DB")] MediaStore[("Object Storage")] User --> UserDB Post --> PostDB Post -->|authorId| User Post -->|mediaUrls| Media Media --> MediaStore PostDB --> FeedItem UserDB --> FeedItem FeedItem --> Cache classDef active fill:#172554,stroke:#60a5fa,color:#ffffff,stroke-width:3px; classDef store fill:#111827,stroke:#38bdf8,color:#dbeafe,stroke-width:2px; classDef inactive fill:#111827,stroke:#334155,color:#94a3b8,stroke-width:1px; class User,Post,Media,FeedItem active; class UserDB,PostDB,MediaStore,Cache store;

Feed Generation

- Feed service reads posts and authors
- Ranking chooses what appears first
- Cache stores the hot feed
- New post events refresh projections

flowchart LR PostDB[("Post DB")] UserDB[("User DB")] EventBus[("New Post Events")] FeedSvc["Feed Service"] Ranker["Ranking
recency + relevance"] Projection[("Feed Projection")] Cache[("Feed Cache")] Gateway["API Gateway"] Client["Client Feed"] PostDB --> FeedSvc UserDB --> FeedSvc EventBus --> FeedSvc FeedSvc --> Ranker Ranker --> Projection Projection --> Cache Cache --> Gateway Gateway --> Client classDef active fill:#422006,stroke:#facc15,color:#ffffff,stroke-width:3px; classDef store fill:#111827,stroke:#f59e0b,color:#fde68a,stroke-width:2px; classDef inactive fill:#111827,stroke:#334155,color:#94a3b8,stroke-width:1px; class FeedSvc,Ranker,Projection,Cache active; class PostDB,UserDB,EventBus store; class Gateway,Client inactive;

Create Post Flow

- User submits text and media
- Post service writes the record
- Media goes to object storage
- Event bus tells the feed to update

flowchart LR User["User App"] Gateway["API Gateway"] PostSvc["Post Service"] PostDB[("Post DB")] MediaStore[("Object Storage
images + video")] EventBus[("Event Bus")] FeedSvc["Feed Service"] FeedCache[("Feed Cache")] User -->|create post| Gateway Gateway --> PostSvc PostSvc -->|write metadata| PostDB PostSvc -->|upload media| MediaStore PostSvc -->|post.created| EventBus EventBus --> FeedSvc FeedSvc --> FeedCache classDef active fill:#581c87,stroke:#c084fc,color:#ffffff,stroke-width:3px; classDef store fill:#111827,stroke:#a78bfa,color:#ede9fe,stroke-width:2px; classDef inactive fill:#111827,stroke:#334155,color:#94a3b8,stroke-width:1px; class User,Gateway,PostSvc,EventBus,FeedSvc active; class PostDB,MediaStore,FeedCache store;

Likes, Comments, Notifications

- Interaction service records the action
- Events update counters in the background
- Notification service pushes to recipients
- Feed cache gets fresh counts

flowchart LR Client["Client UI"] Gateway["API Gateway"] InteractSvc["Interaction Service
likes + comments"] PostDB[("Post DB
counts")] EventBus[("Event Bus")] NotifSvc["Notification Service"] Push["Push Gateway"] Recipient["Recipient UI"] FeedCache[("Feed Cache")] Client -->|like or comment| Gateway Gateway --> InteractSvc InteractSvc --> PostDB InteractSvc -->|interaction.created| EventBus EventBus --> NotifSvc NotifSvc --> Push Push --> Recipient EventBus --> FeedCache classDef active fill:#7f1d1d,stroke:#fb7185,color:#ffffff,stroke-width:3px; classDef store fill:#111827,stroke:#f43f5e,color:#ffe4e6,stroke-width:2px; classDef inactive fill:#111827,stroke:#334155,color:#94a3b8,stroke-width:1px; class Client,Gateway,InteractSvc,EventBus,NotifSvc,Push,Recipient active; class PostDB,FeedCache store;

Deployment and Resilience

- Gateway handles ingress
- Services run in containers
- Mesh adds retries and secure calls
- Databases replicate and back up
- CDN keeps media close to users

flowchart LR Users["Users"] CDN["CDN
media edge"] Ingress["API Gateway
ingress"] subgraph Cluster[Container Cluster] Mesh["Service Mesh
mTLS + retries"] Auth["Auth Pods"] Posts["Post Pods"] Feed["Feed Pods"] Notify["Notification Pods"] Workers["Background Workers"] end subgraph Storage[Resilient Storage] Primary[("Primary DB")] Replica[("Read Replica")] Backup[("Backups")] ObjectStore[("Object Storage")] end Users --> Ingress Users --> CDN CDN --> ObjectStore Ingress --> Mesh Mesh --> Auth Mesh --> Posts Mesh --> Feed Mesh --> Notify Mesh --> Workers Posts --> Primary Feed --> Replica Workers --> Backup Primary --> Replica Primary --> Backup ObjectStore --> Backup classDef active fill:#0c4a6e,stroke:#22d3ee,color:#ffffff,stroke-width:3px; classDef storage fill:#111827,stroke:#67e8f9,color:#cffafe,stroke-width:2px; classDef inactive fill:#111827,stroke:#334155,color:#94a3b8,stroke-width:1px; class Ingress,Mesh,Auth,Posts,Feed,Notify,Workers,CDN active; class Primary,Replica,Backup,ObjectStore storage; class Users inactive;

End-to-End Request

1. Open the app
2. Fetch feed through the gateway
3. Tap like on a post
4. Feed and notification services update
5. UI refreshes in real time

sequenceDiagram
    participant U as User App
    participant G as API Gateway
    participant F as Feed Service
    participant C as Feed Cache
    participant I as Interaction Service
    participant N as Notification Service
    participant P as Push Gateway

    U->>G: fetch feed
    G->>F: route feed request
    F->>C: read cached feed
    C-->>F: ranked posts
    F-->>G: feed response
    G-->>U: render feed
    U->>G: like post
    G->>I: record interaction
    I-->>F: update counts
    I->>N: interaction event
    N->>P: push notification
    P-->>U: real-time update
